case_title: LAWRENCE, WALTER H. VS WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B.

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B. HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-2000 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE, WALTER H. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE ON OEX FILED. SERVED ON DEBTOR'S HUSBAND-SUBSTITUTED SERVICE.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ELEANOR WEHLEN RETURNED -INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS;
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-01-2000 AS TO DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B.
OEX AS ELEANOR WEHLEN O/C; PARTIES FAIL TO APPEAR.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B. HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2000 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B. HEARING SET FOR MAR-30-2000 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MAY 04, 2000 DEEMED PROPER, PER COMM. KAPLAN.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2000, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LAWRENCE, WALTER H. AS TO DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WEHLEN, ELEANOR ADMIN/EXECUTOR OF ESTATE OF C.A.B.
